ctxMarket: Attention is on a broad crypto rally, with Solana up over 5% alongside other majors as global equities rebound and spot Bitcoin ETF inflows accelerate. The focus is also shifting to institutional adoption and new tokenization initiatives on Solana.
ctxTalking:
• Solana’s transaction volume outpacing competitors, processing 8x more than BNB Chain
• Major institutions like Western Union and Scotiabank integrating Solana for stablecoins and ETFs
• New tokenization projects, including IPO shares and tokenized gold, launching on Solana
ctxMatters: Solana’s high transaction throughput is drawing attention as other networks slow. Institutional moves suggest growing confidence in Solana’s infrastructure for stablecoins, ETFs, and asset tokenization. These developments may expand Solana’s use cases and visibility among both retail and institutional participants.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Institutional partnerships and tokenization projects are increasing Solana’s mainstream integration.
Noise: Short-term price surges tied to macro events may not reflect long-term adoption trends.
ctxGlossary:
Tokenization — Turning real-world assets into blockchain-based tokens
Stablecoin — A cryptocurrency pegged to a stable asset, like the US dollar
Spot Bitcoin ETF — An exchange-traded fund holding actual Bitcoin, not derivatives

Western Union teams with Crossmint to support USDPT stablecoin on Solana
